en.content: Billing cycles run from 1st to 30th of each month. Bills are generated on the 1st and due by the 15th. Late payment fee of ₱100 applies after 30 days. You can view your bill online through our customer portal or mobile app.

faqs.a: Pay via GCash, PayMaya, bank transfer, credit card, or over-the-counter at 7-Eleven, Bayad Center, SM Bills Payment, Cebuana, and LBC.
Payments are due by the 15th of each month.
You can request payment extension up to 5 days. Call our billing hotline at 02-8888-1234.

en.content: Internet speed tiers: Basic 25Mbps (₱1299), Pro 50Mbps (₱1899), Premium 100Mbps (₱2499), Gamer 200Mbps (₱3499). Actual speeds may vary by 10-20% due to network conditions, time of day, and device capabilities. For optimal speed, use wired connection and 5GHz WiFi band.

faqs.a: Slow speeds can be due to network congestion (7-11pm), router placement, too many connected devices, or signal interference.
Use speedtest.net or fast.com. Connect via Ethernet for accurate results. Expected: 80% of plan speed.

en.content: Common router models: Huawei HG8245, ZTE F660, FiberHome AN5506. Reset procedure: Press and hold reset button for 10 seconds using paperclip. For fiber connections: LOS red light means no signal - check if fiber cable is bent or damaged. PON light should be solid green.

faqs.a: 1. Unplug router for 30 seconds. 2. Plug back in. 3. Wait 2-3 minutes for lights to stabilize. 4. Test connection.
Red LOS light means fiber signal lost. Check cable connections and report to technical support.

en.content: Current coverage areas: Metro Manila (all cities), Cebu (Cebu City, Mandaue, Lapu-Lapu, Talisay), Davao (Davao City only), Pampanga (Angeles City, San Fernando), Laguna (Calamba, Santa Rosa, Biñan), Cavite (Bacoor, Imus, Dasmariñas). Expanding to Iloilo, Bacolod, Cagayan de Oro by Q3 2024.

faqs.a: Visit our website and enter your address for real-time availability check, or call 02-8888-1234.
Standard installation takes 2-5 business days after application approval.

en.content: Current promotions: New subscribers get 50% off first 3 months. Refer a friend: Both get 1 month free. Senior citizen/PWD discount: 20% off monthly bill (requirements: valid ID). Free installation for all plans until Dec 2024. No lock-in period for Basic plan.

faqs.a: 20% discount for senior citizens and PWD. Submit valid ID at any branch or upload via app.
Yes, free installation for all plans until December 2024 (worth ₱1,500).

en.content: Account management: Reset password via 'Forgot Password' on login page. Update contact info through customer portal. Account verification requires valid ID and recent bill. Multiple accounts can be linked to one email.

faqs.a: Click 'Forgot Password' on login page. Reset link sent to email within 5 minutes.
Update address through portal under Profile Settings. Moving to new area? Check coverage first.

tl.content: Ang billing cycle ay mula ika-1 hanggang ika-30 ng buwan. Lumalabas ang bill tuwing ika-1 at due date ay ika-15. May multang ₱100 pag lampas ng 30 araw. Maaaring tingnan ang bill online sa customer portal o mobile app.

faqs.a: Pwedeng magbayad sa GCash, PayMaya, bank transfer, credit card, o over-the-counter sa 7-Eleven, Bayad Center, SM Bills Payment, Cebuana, at LBC.
Ang bills ay due tuwing ika-15 ng buwan.

tl.content: Internet speed plans: Basic 25Mbps (₱1299), Pro 50Mbps (₱1899), Premium 100Mbps (₱2499), Gamer 200Mbps (₱3499). Ang actual speed ay maaaring mag-iba ng 10-20% dahil sa network condition, oras, at device capabilities.

faqs.a: Maaaring dahil sa maraming gumagamit (7-11pm), maling placement ng router, maraming connected devices, o signal interference.
